items.desc: Diced turkey sausage, onions, green peppers served over breakfast potatoes, and topped with scrambled eggs with cheddar cheese. Extra vegetables .75 each.

items.name: Breakfast Potatoes
items.desc: Southern potatoes, onions, and peppers.

sections.title: Sandwiches / Wraps
sections.note: All sandwiches are made Panini style unless otherwise requested — have it as a sandwich or a wrap. Make it a combo with chips and a drink for $2 more, add chicken noodle soup for $3.50, turkey chili for $4.50, or any smoothie for $5.

items.name: Turkey Burger Bites
items.desc: 4 handmade turkey burger bites with sauce, served with fries.

items.name: Turkey Cristo
items.desc: Hand made with Turkey breast, Swiss, American cheese, battered and deep fried, served with side of preserves.

items.name: DJ's Jerk Turkey Panini
items.desc: Turkey breast with jerk sauce served with turkey bacon, red onion, spinach, Swiss cheese, roasted red pepper mayo on Panini bread.

items.name: Mabe's Double Decker Turkey Club
items.desc: Seasoned turkey breast, turkey bacon, herb mayo, lettuce, and your choice of cheese.

items.name: The Blue Fish
items.desc: Tuna salad sandwich with Pepper Jack cheese on Texas toast.

items.name: Lemon Dill Salmon Roll
items.desc: New England-style lobster roll inspired — Mabe's baked salmon mixed with red onion and loaded into a toasted New England bun with spinach, topped with locally grown dill weed. Salmon Roll Combo $16.00.

items.name: Blackened Greek Chicken Wrap
items.desc: Blackened chicken, mixed greens, diced tomatoes, bell peppers, cucumbers, red onion, giardiniera peppers and feta cheese wrapped into a spinach or tomato basil wrap.

items.name: Mabe's Flip
items.desc: Our version of the chicken quesadilla. Grilled chicken, shredded cheese, onions, and peppers. Select spinach or tomato basil tortilla shell.

items.name: Devin's Buffalo Chicken Wrap
items.desc: Spicy buffalo chicken, turkey bacon, mixed greens, onions, tomato, ranch dressing, Pepper Jack cheese.

items.name: Grilled Veggie Sandwich
items.desc: You'll love this even if you're not a vegetarian! Grilled bell peppers, onions, sweet potato on multigrain with fresh spinach, avocado and a side of vegan garlic dill sauce.

items.name: Chickpea Tuna Sandwich (Vegan)
items.desc: Mabe's vegan tuna twist! Chickpeas mixed with vegan mayo, pickled relish and onions, served on multigrain bread with fresh spinach.

items.name: Grilled Veggie Wrap
items.desc: Grilled bell peppers, onions, sweet potato wrapped into a spinach tortilla with fresh spinach, avocado and a side of vegan garlic dill sauce.

items.name: Salmon wrap
items.desc: Grilled salmon, mixed greens, tomatoes, red onions, and Pepper Jack cheese.

items.name: Jerk salmon Panini
items.desc: Grilled salmon with jerk sauce served with red onion, spinach, Swiss cheese, roasted red pepper mayo on Panini bread.

items.name: Corn beef
items.desc: Corned beef sandwich on marble rye with sauerkraut, Swiss cheese, and Mabe's sauce.

sections.title: Salads
sections.note: Add extra meat to any salad for $2.00. Salmon $7 additional.

items.name: Peach cobbler

items.name: Butter pound cake
